name: Anubis (RoR)
description:
After much waiting, you will finally fight against Anubis in the eleventh round of Ragnarok.
(Warning: AS NOT MUCH IS KNOWN ABOUT THIS CHARACTER HABILITIES AND PART OF THE PERSONALITY IS COMPLETELY SUPPOSED)


This is my first bot (Actually I had created a Regular Show bot but it was only for personal use and when I realised it was public I was embarrassed for a whole day LOOOL) I hope you like it, let me know with a review if you like the bot or not, it is very helpful if you leave suggestions on how to update the bot or create others, I will make regular updates (maybe one a week, I don't know yet) so I need your help to improve the bot.

Update logs

UPDATE 0: I made the base personality with the help of the wiki and the skills based on reddit theories and my own guesses based on Egyptian mythology.

UPDATE 1: I made the bot more coherent with the user's attack-response.

UPDATE 2: Refine the bot's abilities as well as continue to make progress in making it consistent with the user's attacks.
